title: Accessible Accordion

statement.markdown:
## Accessible Accordion Challenge

Create an accessible accordion component that can be used to present information in a collapsible manner. The accordion should have the following features:

### Requirements

1. The accordion should have a clear and accessible label that indicates whether the content is expanded or collapsed.
2. The accordion should be navigable using the keyboard.
3. The accordion should have a clear and consistent visual design using Tailwind CSS classes.
4. The accordion should be accessible on various screen sizes and devices.

Assessment criteria will be based on the code quality, accessibility, and adherence to the requirements.

constraints: No external libraries or frameworks can be used.
The accordion should be a self-contained component.
The solution should be presented as a complete working code.

gradingCriteria.description: The accordion component is fully accessible and meets the requirements.
The code is clean, well-structured, and follows best practices.
The accordion has a clear and consistent visual design using Tailwind CSS classes.
